mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deworming_record (pet_id, deworming_name, deworming_date, next_due_date, status) VALUES (#{petId}, #{dewormingName}, #{dewormingDate}, #{nextDueDate}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, pet_id, deworming_name, deworming_date, next_due_date, status, create_time FROM deworming_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, pet_id, deworming_name, deworming_date, next_due_date, status, create_time FROM deworming_record WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY deworming_date DESC

SELECT dr.id, dr.pet_id, dr.deworming_name, dr.deworming_date, dr.next_due_date, dr.status, dr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name FROM deworming_record dr LEFT JOIN pet ON dr.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pet.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND dr.status = 0 AND dr.next_due_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY dr.next_due_date ASC

SELECT dr.id, dr.pet_id, dr.deworming_name, dr.deworming_date, dr.next_due_date, dr.status, dr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name FROM deworming_record dr LEFT JOIN pet ON dr.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pet.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND dr.status = 0 AND dr.next_due_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY dr.next_due_date ASC

SELECT dr.id, dr.pet_id, dr.deworming_name, dr.deworming_date, dr.next_due_date, dr.status, dr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name FROM deworming_record dr LEFT JOIN pet ON dr.pet_id = pet.id ORDER BY dr.create_time DESC
